title: Social Media Operations Intern (Shenton Way)
description:
We are looking for a motivated and creative Social Media Operations Intern to take ownership of content ideation, execution, and daily operations across multiple digital platforms, including TikTok, RED (Xiaohongshu),YouTube, and other relevant social or content platforms.

This internship offers hands-on, execution-focused experience in contentstrategy, social media operations, and data-driven growth. Interns are expectedto proactively generate ideas, execute content independently, and optimizeperformance under guidance from the marketing team.

Key Responsibilities

Content Strategy & Creation      

  • Independently propose and execute content ideas,including copywriting, visuals, and short-form video concepts aligned with brand positioning.  
  • Take ownership of assigned content from ideation to publishing, ensuring quality and timeliness.
  • Actively track platform trends and translate insights into actionable content concepts.

Platform Operations & Growth

  • Manage day-to-day operations of assigned socialmedia accounts, including content posting, engagement, and basic communitymanagement.

·        Plan and execute user growth initiatives, suchas content series, themed campaigns, or creator collaborations.

Performance Analysis & Optimization

  •  Monitor content performance and key metrics (views, engagement, followers).
  • Use data insights to optimize future content ideas and formats.

Cross-functional Collaboration

  • Work closely with internal teams to ensure content supports brand and campaign objectives.
  • Coordinate with external creators or partners when needed to execute content initiatives.

Qualifications

  • Currently pursuing or recently completed a Diploma / Degree in Marketing, Communications, Media Studies, or related fields.     
  • Strong interest in social media platforms and digital content operations.
  • Familiarity with platforms such as Tiktok, RED (Xiaohongshu), Youtube, Instagram, or TikTok is an advantage.
  • Basic understanding of social media analytics and performance metrics.
  • Good written & communication skills in English   
  • Potential for conversion to full-time role based on performance
  • Working location at Shenton Way

At Smart Forte, it is our mission to help you find your dream job. Since 2004, we have been helping people like you, find their passion so that they will love their job. We have close relationships with companies from various industries, therefore providing you only the best available jobs. We specialise in permanent and contract recruitment solutions. Additionally, we offer career advise, comprehensive interview advise and consulting services.

Our core values are the heart of our business. With over a decade of experience, we have a deep understanding of the markets and the people we work with, from candidates to clients. We are passionate about creating valuable relationships with everyone, and are committed to deliver our service offerings with the utmost professionalism and reliability.
